scripts.release:check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build:core && bun run build:cli && bun run build:local-mcp
scripts.release:pack:cli: cd packages/cli && bun run build && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.release:pack:core: cd packages/core && bun run build && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.release:pack:local-mcp: cd packages/local-mcp && bun run build && npm pack --dry-run
